holdings.infoBox: ICLN is an equity ETF with a total of 133 individual holdings. The top holdings are Bloom Energy stock at 13.82%, First Solar at 9.03%, Nextpower at 7.54%, China Yangtze Power at 5.89%, and Enphase Energy at 4.71%.

overview.description: The iShares Global Clean Energy ETF (ICLN) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the S&P Global Clean Energy Transition index. The fund tracks a tiered index of global companies involved in clean energy businesses. ICLN was launched on Jun 24, 2008 and is issued by BlackRock.
